description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a striking black and gold color scheme with intricate gold graphic patterns across the upper. The shoe has a robust, thick black sole with pronounced tread segments, providing both style and support. White laces are threaded through reinforced eyelets, contrasting sharply with the darker tones of the shoe. The collar and heel area are padded for comfort and ankle support, while the toe box is perforated for breathability. The overall design is modern and urban, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic leather, rubber, and fabric, giving the shoe both durability and flexibility.
description: A high-top black and gold sneaker with bold graphic patterns, white laces, and a thick, rugged sole. The design is modern, urban, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold graphic pattern, black overlays, and the thick, sculpted sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white criss-cross laces, perforated toe box, and padded tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar gold patterning and visible sole structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded heel collar and the continuation of the gold pattern around the back.
